rulings.Case Title: MARY CARROLL-GAMACHE VS. EUGENE GAMACHE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 29, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT EUGENE GAMACHE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. This action is stayed until the determination regarding the status of the property is rendered in the family court case which was filed first. Upon such determination Plaintiff may file an amended complaint so alleging. Both parties' requests for judicial notice are granted. = (501/REQ)
